greeting.line: People call it a hobby. Forty-one binders of things that don't add up is not a hobby.
greeting.line_friendly: Pull up a binder. I trust your eyes.
greeting.line_hostile: Those files are not for you. Close the drawer.

lore.line: Missing time. Doors that weren't there. I write down every account, dates cross-referenced. They laugh at me, but nobody's ever found an error in my files.
